personal.name: Dimitrios Stergiou
personal.title: CISO
personal.bio: Security executive with 25+ years building compliance-driven security programs across fintech and payments. Hands-on technical depth meets board-level communication. I get things certified, secured, and shipped.

achievements: Achieved SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, and DORA compliance — all on time, zero audit observations
Built corporate IT function from scratch for 300+ employees and 600+ contractors globally
Designed and implemented enterprise-wide information security strategy and risk management framework
Secured cloud-native AWS infrastructure and integrated DevSecOps into engineering workflow
scope: Manage Corporate IT department providing remote support across all global locations
Create and operate information security risk management system (ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI DSS)
Oversee security event monitoring, incident response solutions and processes
Drive business continuity and disaster recovery planning and testing
Translate technology and business risk requirements into systems and metrics for measuring them
Implement technical controls for DORA and GDPR / Privacy regulations
Manage third party vendors offering services to Corporate IT

achievements: Achieved first SOC 2 attestation, establishing trust framework for investors and enterprise customers
Led PCI DSS (SAQ) compliance and drove application security improvements across the product
Built and embedded information security policy framework from the ground up
Managed team of 4 external security consultants alongside internal stakeholders
scope: Define and develop information security risk management strategy aligned with business objectives
Demonstrate InfoSec competence to partners, board, and investors through accreditation (SOC 2, PCI DSS)
Define and embed information security policy framework for customers, teammates, investors, and partners
Direct investigations into security incidents, liaising with regulatory bodies and ensuring root cause analysis
Promote an information security-aware culture across the organization

achievements: Achieved ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 certification across all EU operations
Established Security Champions and IT Security Coordinator networks across the organization
Led M&A security due diligence for acquisitions, ensuring professional risk assessment and integration
scope: Responsible for compliance with information security and privacy laws
Managing and executing external third-party audits
Create and operate the information security risk management framework

Develop and manage the information security budget
Manage the information security team (direct and dotted lines)

achievements: Zero security incidents over 18 months across 30 indirect reports and multiple subsidiaries
Co-led Group-wide GDPR compliance project across all subsidiaries
Established security maturity models and roadmap for continual program improvement
Operated a network of 30+ Security Champions / indirect reports
scope: Provide guidance and counsel to CSO, CIO, and executive team on information security objectives
Together with the Group DPO, lead the GDPR project aligning with InfoSec governance framework
Manage Group-wide information security governance, coordinate InfoSec Operations Committee
Lead Information Security Liaisons in establishing program and project priorities
Establish annual and long-range security and compliance goals, define strategies and metrics
Support and guidance in the M&A process ensuring professional assessment of InfoSec risk
Mentor Security Champions and IT Security Coordinator Network
Lead development of policies and practices to secure protected and sensitive data
Coordinate and track all IT and security-related audits
Create education and awareness programs across all entities

achievements: Built and maintained ISO 27001 certification from scratch over 6-year tenure
Successfully passed 12+ regulatory audits annually across UKGC, AAMS, MGA, AGCC, CCC
Zero major security incidents throughout entire tenure
